name: Long-Term Capital Gains Treatment for Patent Transfers

eligibility.description: Applies to 'holders' (the creator or an individual who funded the creator before the invention was reduced to practice) who transfer all substantial rights to a patent to an unrelated party.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Treats the transfer of all substantial rights to a patent as a sale of a capital asset held for more than 1 year, regardless of the actual holding period.
